name: Malampa (Vanuatu)

colors.symbolism: the outrigger canoe and the three stars

description: Diagonally divided green at the lower hoist and blue at the upper fly, with a broad yellow diagonal band bearing a black outrigger canoe and three black five-pointed stars for the islands of Malekula, Ambrym and Paama.
history: Malampa is a province of Vanuatu formed in 1994, its name an acronym of its three main islands - Malekula, Ambrym and Paama - represented by the three stars.

features.role: three stars for Malekula, Ambrym and Paama
